message:
🌱 Add opentofu: Concise mode for tofu plan mission (#834)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-306-concise-mode-for-tofu-plan",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: Concise mode for tofu plan",
+    "description": "Concise mode for tofu plan. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check OpenTofu installation",
+        "description": "Verify your OpenTofu version:\n```bash\ntofu version\n```\nThis feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the feature context",
+        "description": "It would be great to have a way to shrink the output of terraform, which is very noisy. \nA `--short` or `--concise` parameter where only the resources updated would show, and all the refresh and noisy info on apply or plan would be filtered out."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Concise mode for tofu plan",
+        "description": "### Implemented -concise flag that reduces the noise in the output of plan\n\nInstead of adding another ViewType like HumanView or JsonView, I chose to add a bool flag for concise within the global View that takes care of compact warnings and no colour so that in future if a concise mode needs to be\n```go\n// The PlanHuman implementation renders human-readable text logs, suitable for\n// a scrolling terminal.\ntype PlanHuman struct {\n\tview *View\n\tconcise bool\n\tinAutomation bool\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the feature is working as expected:\n```bash\ntofu version\ntofu validate\ntofu plan\n```\nConfirm that the feature described in \"Concise mode for tofu plan\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### Implemented -concise flag that reduces the noise in the output of plan\n\nInstead of adding another ViewType like HumanView or JsonView, I chose to add a bool flag for concise within the global View that takes care of compact warnings and no colour so that in future if a concise mode needs to be implemented for other commands like apply or destroy, the same flag can be used.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "// The PlanHuman implementation renders human-readable text logs, suitable for\n// a scrolling terminal.\ntype PlanHuman struct {\n\tview *View\n\tconcise bool\n\tinAutomation bool\n}",
+        "// The PlanHuman implementation renders human-readable text logs, suitable for\n// a scrolling terminal.\ntype PlanHuman struct {\n\tview *View\n\tinAutomation bool\n}\n\ntype PlanHumanConcise struct {\n        view *View\n\tinAutomation bool"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentofu",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentofu"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/306",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/pull/1225"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 22,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "tofu"
+    ],
+    "description": "OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:42:47.766Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
